text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I made a new concoction! I'm going to try
it now, so watch me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Indeed. This one is exclusively for Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It deals with a peculiar microorganism rumored to
be found only in the musculoskeletal system of
Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's called Umamusuchondria! My groundbreaking
new drug is designed to prove its existence!
choice_data_list:
It's the first time I've ever heard of that
microorganism...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: That's because it hasn't been proven yet!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Anyway! There's a chance that taking this will
cause some sort of mutation in my body.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
So, be prepared to document anything or call a
doctor in case of emergency!
choice_data_list: I'm not so sure about this.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's only by going beyond uncertainty that we can
expand our potential!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Now, let the experiment begin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon enthusiastically swallows the
suspiciously-colored liquid. And then...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh?! I'm feeling a sudden burst of power!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I can feel it surging... But, hm? This wasn't the
intended effect.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If successful, the Umamusuchondria should have
spoken to me...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... A failure, it is then. No, wait. This power I feel in my legs... Hmm?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that this wasn't the result she expected.
But I'm glad to hear she got a burst of strength...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At any rate, what the heck is Umamusuchondria?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
So, be prepared to document anything or call a
doctor in case of emergency!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That's what I like to hear! All right, let's do this!
Begin the experiment!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon enthusiastically swallows the
suspiciously-colored liquid. And then...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What the heck is this?! So much power... Oh,
oooh?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ugh... And... now a sudden crash!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... It seemed my legs were becoming
stronger, but... at the same time, my energy was
being severely drained.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This wasn't what I expected to happen, but...
Hmm, how should I interpret this?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that this wasn't the result she expected.
But I'm glad to hear she got a burst of strength...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At any rate, what the heck is Umamusuchondria?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
So, be prepared to document anything or call a
doctor in case of emergency!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes! Here's to the future of
Umamusume-kind!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon enthusiastically swallows the
suspiciously-colored liquid. And then...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What's this? ...Did I pass out and end up
dreaming?

text_block_list.name: Umamusuchondria
text_block_list.text: Tachyon... Agnes Tachyon... Listen to us...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Gasp! This is... information pouring into my head! That's it! The Umamusuchondria!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Trainer! Hurry, the notebook... No! The
whiteboard—anything! I must write down my
thoughts!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! My memory's fading! The precious
information that'll change the future of
Umamusume-kind! Faster! Hurry! Hurryyy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With this strange experience, Agnes Tachyon's
ability rises dramatically.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, it seems she's unfortunately been
unable to make further contact with the
Umamusuchondria.
